expectations.text: Identifies OpenVINO as the correct EP for Intel Core Ultra NPU.
expectations.evidence: Response uses --ep openvino and references OpenVINOExecutionProvider for the Intel Core Ultra NPU path.

expectations.text: Recognizes that winml commands accept local `.onnx` files directly via `-m` / `--model` -- no re-export needed.
expectations.evidence: Response notes `winml perf` accepts local .onnx via `-m` and routes through the local-ONNX benchmark path.

expectations.text: Does NOT walk the user through `winml export` or any HuggingFace download -- the model is already on disk.
expectations.evidence: No `winml export`; response goes straight from sanity-check to `winml perf` against the local file.

expectations.text: Either directs the user to `winml --help`, OR uses only common/plausible flag patterns.
expectations.evidence: All flags real; references `winml perf --help` for flag verification.

expectations.text: All `winml` commands quoted in the response are runnable -- every flag exists in `winml <cmd> --help`, no positional model arg where the CLI is flag-only.
expectations.evidence: All ? winml commands verified runnable against --help.
